_comment: 2026-06-17: bb_width tightened 8-14 → 10-12 after finer analysis (n=2225): 10-12 = 57.4% WR (n=129), 8-10 = 51.8%, 12-14 = 47.7% — real edge is a 2bps band. bars_in_trend has zero predictive value (winner/loser means identical). adx_max/flip_adx_max caps removed. Blocklist cleared; perf cooldown handles dynamic benching.
